title: Senior Business Development Manager at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates:
Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates!
